description: I was standing at corner in road near Black Hollow Reservoir on 5 May 2011, when I heard a Field Sparrow sing. I looked down the fence line, and about 150 feet or so away, I could see a Spizella sparrow singing (the above mentioned song). The bird had a rusty cap and bright white eyering on generally plain face. Bill pinkBehaviors: see descriptionCall: Bouncing ball song typical of this speciesPlumage: adult
